articles.title: TradFi fund manager Baillie Gifford introduces Solana, Ethereum tokenized fund with BNY
articles.description: Baillie Gifford Enhanced Yield Fund (BAGEY) is denominated in dollars, and gives eligible investors access to an actively managed, short-duration portfolio of public corporate bonds.

articles.title: Bank of England eases stablecoin rules, introduces 40B pound issuance cap
articles.description: The Bank of England published draft rules for systemic stablecoins, easing reserve requirements and replacing holding limits with a temporary 40-billion British pound issuance cap.

articles.title: As bitcoin, altcoin prices gain, derivatives signal skepticism over a sustained rally
articles.description: Analysts noted bitcoin is stuck between key support near $60,000 and resistance around $68,000, and a bearish chart pattern could send prices toward $54,000.

articles.title: Q2 2026 emerges as most-hacked quarter on record with 83 incidents
articles.description: Crypto hackers stole $755 million across 83 cybersecurity incidents, as cross–chain bridges remained the most costly attack vector of the crypto industry.

articles.title: Bank of England backs down on strict stablecoin holding limits, sets $50 billion issuance cap
articles.description: The U.K. central bank abandons retail holding limits for a 40-billion-pound aggregate cap and sweetens yield terms for token issuers ahead of a 2027 market launch.

articles.title: Taiko halts its Ethereum layer-2 network after a bridge exploit, token dives
articles.description: An attacker forged withdrawal proofs to drain about $1.7 million, the same type of flaw behind this year's biggest bridge hacks. Fast containment kept the damage small.

articles.title: South Korea pushes Travel Rule expansion for smaller crypto transfers
articles.description: South Korea’s FIU is calling for broader crypto transfer reporting rules during FATF talks, citing offshore risks and uneven global AML enforcement.
